calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Dismiss This Action For Failure To Join Indispensable Parties
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARLENE ERLACH'S Motion To Dismiss This Action For Failure To Join Indispensable Parties is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B; no courtesy copies of the moving papers received as of 2:44 pm, June 28, 2019. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Set For Trial On Jul-01-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
